description.short: Catch yourself before you do it again. AI for the moment before behavior happens.
description.full: COYL is the behavioral interrupt layer for Microsoft Teams. Built on the open Behavioral Interrupt Protocol (BIP) + four sibling specs (PAP, EAP, UAP, RAP), COYL lives in the three-second window between intention and action — the moment focus dies, the moment a follow-up gets dropped, the moment a hard meeting ends and the reward script fires. Four AI-powered interrupt classes ship inside Teams as adaptive cards: Focus Defender (protects scheduled deep work), Follow-Through Pinger (catches outbound emails about to fall stale), Meeting Decliner (surfaces the calendar-pressure your team is folding under), and Recovery Coach (60-second resets between high-cortisol windows). Honest about what COYL is: behavioral support, not medical treatment. Not a replacement for therapy, coaching, or clinical care — the layer underneath all of them, so the moment-by-moment accountability that used to require someone in the room finally exists for everyone.

commands.description: Show your current daily number + active pattern.

commands.description: Record a slip if a commitment broke in the last few hours.

commands.title: focus
commands.description: Protect the next scheduled focus block on your calendar.

commands.description: Show what COYL inside Teams can do.
